channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ben Roberts-Smith planned overseas business venture before arrest
item.description: Court documents released in April 2026 show that Ben Roberts-Smith, the former Australian soldier accused of war crimes in Afghanistan, had been investigating overseas business opportunities before hi...

item.title: ACCC challenges Woolworths over misleading discounts amid inflation changes
item.description: Australia’s competition watchdog, the ACCC, has taken Woolworths and Coles to the Federal Court over allegations of misleading discount practices. The case centres on Woolworths’ 'Prices Dropped' camp...

item.title: Trump pledges rapid renovation of Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool using private contractor
item.description: During a press briefing in the Oval Office, President Donald Trump shifted focus from ongoing US pharmaceutical and industrial policy to announce a major renovation of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting ...

item.title: HYBE CEO Bang Si-hyuk reportedly under investigation by authorities
item.description: Bang Si-hyuk, the founder and CEO of HYBE, the South Korean entertainment company known for managing the global K-pop phenomenon BTS, has reportedly come under legal scrutiny. Authorities are investig...

item.title: Shareholders greenlight Paramount's US$110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros despite industry concerns
item.description: Shareholders of Warner Bros. Discovery have overwhelmingly approved a US$110 billion merger with Paramount Skydance, despite significant opposition from Hollywood professionals. Paramount outbid Netfl...

item.title: Senior Official Provides Evidence on Mandelson's Security Clearance Process
item.description: Cat Little, the Cabinet Office's most senior civil servant, has given evidence to the Commons Foreign Affairs Committee regarding the vetting of Lord Mandelson for his proposed role as UK ambassador t...

item.title: Philippine Team Heads to Czech Republic for Zaldy Co's Return Process

item.title: Shebeshxt’s bail hearing continues in Polokwane magistrate’s court
item.description: Controversial Lekompo artist Lehlogonolo “Shebeshxt” Chauke appeared again in the Polokwane Magistrate’s Court on Thursday as his bail application proceedings continued. The case has drawn significant...

item.title: DOLE Reports Over 115,000 Job Openings at Labor Day Employment Fairs
item.description: The Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE) announced that more than 115,000 job vacancies will be available during Labor Day job fairs across the Philippines. These fairs aim to provide opportuniti...

item.description: In Episode 27 of the popular Filipino drama series 'The Alibi,' Vincent expresses hope and confidence that all the challenges and struggles he and Stella have faced will eventually bear positive resul...

item.title: Top Movie Recommendations to Stream in April 2026

item.title: India rejects offensive remarks in Trump repost, emphasises strong US-India ties
item.description: The Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) of India on Thursday issued a statement responding to US President Donald Trump's repost of comments from a right-wing commentator, Michael Savage, who described...

item.title: African Currencies Losing Value Against US Dollar in Early 2026
item.description: As of April 2026, the Libyan dinar has emerged as Africa's worst-performing currency, losing over 17% against the US dollar. Following it are the Ghanaian cedi with a 10.28% decline and the Tanzanian ...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Warns of Heavy Rainfall and Strong Winds Across Several Counties
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has issued a warning for continued rainfall across various regions of Kenya over the next 24 hours, highlighting heavier downpours along the coastal counties ...

item.title: Exploring the Mathematical Precision in Paolo Čerić’s Animated GIFs
item.description: Paolo Čerić, a Croatian programmer and visual artist, has been creating animated GIFs that challenge the viewer's perception and offer a unique visual experience. His work is characterized by mathemat...

item.title: Frustrating Experience of Trying to Buy World Cup Tickets for Vancouver
item.description: Marsha Lederman shares the tale of her chaotic attempt to purchase World Cup tickets for Vancouver. Despite multiple attempts in various lotteries, she was unable to secure tickets for her soccer-obse...

item.title: Alexandria Enriquez wins first gold medal for Philippines at Sanya Asian Beach Games
item.description: Naghatid ng karangalan si Alexandria Enriquez matapos masungkit ang kauna-unahang gintong medalya ng Team Philippines sa ginaganap na Asian Beach Games sa Sanya, China. Ang kanyang panalo ay nagsilbin...

item.title: Skepta found not guilty of drug-driving after court questions evidence reliability
item.description: British grime artist Skepta, whose real name is Joseph Adenuga, has been cleared of a drug-driving charge following court proceedings at High Wycombe Magistrates' Court. The case stemmed from an incid...

item.title: Balik-tanaw sa Kapamilya Deal or No Deal contestants na umuwi na may ₱1 na premyo
item.description: The article looks back at memorable moments from the Philippine game show “Kapamilya Deal or No Deal,” focusing on contestants who ended up winning only ₱1, commonly referred to as becoming “pisonaryo...
